data.description:
## Why
`docs/coverage.md:89-91` says Jira link/relation round-trips are intentionally absent
because link sync "is not yet a reconciler capability" — but link sync IS implemented
(story 25ae) and `tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/test_link_sync.py` has asserting tests
for both outbound (`_diff_links` -> `client.set_relationship`) and inbound (`_diff_links_
inbound`) directions. The stale inventory makes the coverage matrix untrustworthy for
finding genuinely-missing coverage. VALIDATED.

## What
Update the behavior/interface matrix so link-sync round-trips are listed as covered, citing
the integration test.

## Scope
- `docs/coverage.md` (and regenerate if it is derived).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/coverage.md` no longer claims link sync is "not yet a capability."
- [ ] The link-sync round-trip entry cites `test_link_sync.py` (both directions).
- [ ] If the matrix is generated, the generator/source is updated so it does not regress.
data.title: Refresh docs/coverage.md Jira link-sync inventory
